title: nepeta floccosa
intro: Nepeta floccosa, also known as woolly catmint, is a perennial herb in the mint family native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Nepeta floccosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and even support respiratory health. Nepeta floccosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and creams to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
